title: iPhone 15 Pro Technical Specifications
content: Display: 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR. Processor: A17 Pro chip. Storage options: 128GB, 256GB, 512GB, 1TB. Camera: 48MP main, 12MP ultra-wide, 12MP telephoto. Battery: Up to 23 hours video playback. Connectivity: 5G, Wi-Fi 6E, Bluetooth 5.3. Dimensions: 146.6 x 70.6 x 8.25mm. Weight: 187 grams. Colors: Natural Titanium, Blue Titanium, White Titanium, Black Titanium.

metadata.notes: Technical specifications - no narrative, no relationships
